about.heroSubtitle: Pearl Mansion — the luxury beauty sanctuary founded from a passion for pure beauty and skincare artistry.
about.story: Pearl Mansion was born from the vision to create Asia's premier ultra-luxury beauty space. With Japanese mikimoto pearl powder, 24K gold leaf, diamond and Swiss stem cells, each treatment is a transformational journey.
about.vision: Our mission is to deliver an ultra-luxury spa experience for the most discerning guests. Every detail is designed to create absolute relaxation.
